rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: The output maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The output audits every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not traced.
